module.name: backend-core
module.components: config.py - Application configuration security.py - Authentication & authorization database.py - Database connection & sessions dependencies.py - FastAPI dependencies

contracts.contract: Database session management JWT token generation/validation Password hashing Configuration loading
Environment variables PostgreSQL connection Redis connection

module.name: users
module.components: models.py - User, UserProfile models schemas.py - Pydantic schemas service.py - Business logic router.py - API endpoints

contracts.contract: User CRUD operations Email/Telegram registration JWT authentication Profile management
M-001 (backend-core) Email service

module.name: vpn
module.components: models.py - VPNServer, VPNClient, VPNConfig models schemas.py - Pydantic schemas amneziawg.py - AmneziaWG integration (from legacy) service.py - VPN business logic router.py - API endpoints

contracts.contract: VPN config generation Key pair generation Peer management QR code generation Traffic statistics
M-001 (backend-core) M-002 (users) AmneziaWG system package

module.notes: Legacy code from krot-prod-main/backend/amneziawg.py MUST preserve AmneziaWG protocol parameters

module.name: billing
module.components: models.py - Plan, Subscription, Payment models schemas.py - Pydantic schemas yookassa.py - YooKassa integration tinkoff.py - Tinkoff integration service.py - Billing business logic router.py - API endpoints webhooks.py - Payment webhooks handler

contracts.contract: Plan management Subscription lifecycle Payment processing Recurring billing Payment history
M-001 (backend-core) M-002 (users) M-003 (vpn) YooKassa API credentials Tinkoff API credentials

module.name: referrals
module.components: models.py - ReferralCode, Referral models schemas.py - Pydantic schemas service.py - Referral logic router.py - API endpoints

contracts.contract: Referral code generation Referral tracking Bonus calculation Reward distribution
M-001 (backend-core) M-002 (users) M-004 (billing)

module.name: admin
module.components: router.py - Admin API endpoints analytics.py - Business metrics server_management.py - VPN server management

contracts.contract: User management (admin view) Analytics dashboard data Server management System configuration
M-001 (backend-core) M-002 (users) M-003 (vpn) M-004 (billing)

module.name: routing
module.components: models.py - CustomRoute model routing_manager.py - iptables/ipset management (from legacy) service.py - Routing logic router.py - API endpoints

contracts.contract: RU IPset updates Custom route management Split-tunneling configuration Routing statistics
M-001 (backend-core) iptables/ipset system tools

module.name: telegram-bot
module.description: Telegram bot for notifications and management
module.components: bot.py - Main bot application handlers.py - Command handlers keyboards.py - Inline keyboards notifications.py - User notifications

contracts.contract: Telegram OAuth login Subscription notifications Basic account management Support chat
Backend API (HTTP client) Telegram Bot Token

module.name: frontend-user
module.components: src/pages/Dashboard - Main user dashboard src/pages/Auth - Login/Register pages src/pages/Subscription - Subscription management src/pages/Config - VPN config download src/pages/Referrals - Referral program src/components - Reusable UI components src/hooks - Custom React hooks src/stores - Zustand stores src/i18n - Internationalization

contracts.contract: User authentication UI Subscription purchase flow VPN config download Usage statistics display PWA installation
Backend API

module.name: frontend-admin
module.components: src/pages/Dashboard - Admin dashboard src/pages/Users - User management src/pages/Servers - Server management src/pages/Plans - Plan management src/pages/Analytics - Business analytics src/pages/Settings - System settings

contracts.contract: Admin dashboard UI User management UI Analytics visualization System configuration UI
Backend Admin API

module.name: email
module.components: service.py - Email sending logic templates/ - Jinja2 email templates

contracts.contract: Welcome emails Payment confirmations Subscription expiry warnings Password reset
SMTP credentials

module.name: tasks
module.components: scheduler.py - APScheduler setup subscription_tasks.py - Subscription expiry checks notification_tasks.py - Scheduled notifications cleanup_tasks.py - Database cleanup

contracts.contract: Scheduled subscription checks Automated notifications Database maintenance
M-001 (backend-core) M-004 (billing) M-011 (email)

flow.name: user-registration
flow.steps: 1. User submits email/password or Telegram auth 2. System creates user account 3. System generates VPN keypair 4. System creates trial subscription (3 days) 5. System creates VPN config 6. System sends welcome email 7. User redirected to dashboard with config

flow.name: subscription-purchase
flow.steps: 1. User selects plan 2. System creates payment in YooKassa/Tinkoff 3. User redirected to payment page 4. Payment provider sends webhook 5. System validates payment 6. System activates/extends subscription 7. System sends confirmation email 8. System notifies via Telegram (if connected)

flow.name: vpn-connection
flow.steps: 1. User downloads config or scans QR 2. User imports config to AmneziaWG client 3. Client initiates connection to RU server 4. RU server authenticates via public key 5. RU server routes non-RU traffic through DE tunnel 6. RU traffic goes directly 7. System logs traffic statistics

flow.name: referral-reward
flow.steps: 1. User shares referral link 2. New user registers via link 3. System tracks referral 4. When referred user pays, referrer gets bonus 5. Bonus added as account balance or extra days

phase.name: foundation
phase.deliverables: Project structure Database models Authentication system Basic API skeleton
phase.verification: Unit tests for auth API endpoint tests Database migration tests

phase.name: vpn-core
phase.deliverables: AmneziaWG integration (from legacy) VPN config generation Split-tunneling setup QR code generation
phase.verification: Config generation tests Peer management tests Integration tests with AmneziaWG

phase.name: billing
phase.deliverables: Plan management YooKassa integration Tinkoff integration Subscription lifecycle Webhook handlers
phase.verification: Payment flow tests (sandbox) Webhook handling tests Subscription expiry tests

phase.name: frontend-user
phase.deliverables: User authentication pages Dashboard with stats Subscription purchase flow Config download page PWA manifest and service worker i18n (RU/EN)
phase.verification: Component tests E2E tests for critical flows PWA installation tests

phase.name: admin-and-extras
phase.deliverables: Admin dashboard User management Analytics Referral system Email notifications
phase.verification: Admin API tests Referral flow tests Email delivery tests

phase.name: telegram-and-polish
phase.deliverables: Telegram bot Telegram OAuth Notification integration Documentation Deployment scripts
phase.verification: Bot command tests OAuth flow tests End-to-end integration tests

execution.description: Execute phases sequentially. Within each phase, independent modules can be developed in parallel.
